title: silene sendtneri subsp. balcanica
intro: Silene sendtneri subsp. balcanica, also known as Balkan catchfly, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Balkan catchfly can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and wounds.
